title: Unilever Nigeria Reports Strong Third Quarter Results, EPS Ip By 15.3% - FinancialEDGE
description: Unilever Nigeria Plc unaudited third quarter financial results for the period ended September 30, 2025, showed impressive growth driven by robust revenue expansion and disciplined cost management. The company's earnings per share (EPS) went up by 15.3% year-on-year to N1.32, with nine month 2025 EPS growing by 99.7% year-on-year to N3.83. Highlights of the results
html:
Unilever Nigeria Plc unaudited third quarter financial results for the period ended September 30, 2025, showed impressive growth driven by robust revenue expansion and disciplined cost management.

The company’s earnings per share (EPS) went up by 15.3% year-on-year to N1.32, with nine month 2025 EPS growing by  99.7% year-on-year to N3.83.

Highlights of the results shows that revenue expanded by 43.5% year-on-year, driven by effective pricing strategy and moderate volume gains.

EBITDA margin grew by 334 basis points year-on-year to 21.6%, reflecting marginal increase in operating expenses.

Profit after tax rose by 15.3% year-on-year to N7.58 billion, despite a higher effective tax rate.
